_comment: Project-local override for /shipwright-compliance detective audit. Merges shallowly over the plugin _DEFAULT_CONFIG (audit_detector.py). Only keys present here override; everything else keeps plugin defaults. shipwright-webui is an adopted monorepo-style project with no plan-config splits, so conventional-commit scopes are cross-cutting component names rather than split slugs — the g2_stoplist below enumerates every scope in active use so G2 stops flagging them. Added 2026-05-15 as part of the Iterate K/M compliance-hygiene cleanup. 2026-06-12 (iterate-2026-06-12-compliance-reconcile-b7-g2): added 'actions' (custom-action feature, PR #123 feat(actions)) + 'review' (PR-review CI, PR #125 ci(review)) to reconcile G2 post-v0.18.0. 2026-06-12 (iterate-2026-06-12-compliance-bloat-g2-reconcile): added 'agent-docs' (agent-docs hygiene condense, PR #128 docs(agent-docs) commit 18cf09d). 2026-06-14 (iterate-2026-06-14-compliance-d3-g2-h1-reconcile): added 'responsive' (responsive tablet+phone views FR-01.38/FR-01.39, commits 74175ba/d30d8a7 feat(responsive)). New conventional-commit scopes must be appended here in the same PR that introduces them.
_a5_phase_b_comment: A5.6 dormant-trigger opt-in. security.yml + codeql.yml were deliberately moved to Phase B (active pull_request + weekly schedule) in commit 7196205 (codeql d66ab55). This flag tells the compliance audit the activation is intentional, so A5.6's 'non-dormant trigger active' sub-case PASSES instead of emitting a permanent LOW false-positive. The structural guards (workflow_dispatch presence, bare-'on:' failure) still fire — narrower than disabled_checks:[A5.6]. Producer fix: shipwright PR #164 (a5_phase_b_activated). Accepted-meanwhile decision-drop: iterate-2026-06-07-a5-6-dormant-accepted.
